title: rosa villosa var. vayredae
intro: Rosa villosa var. vayredae, also known as the hairy rose or Rosa vayredae, is a variety of rose plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa villosa var. vayredae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
